name: guild-book
description: A His Majesty the Worm adventurer creator and rules reference. SvelteKit monolith, content-pack driven, tarot-based, Adherent of the Worm licence-compliant.
author: Arrowed

scripts.content:build: node scripts/content-import/md-inject.mjs && node scripts/content-import/md-rules.mjs && node scripts/content-import/md-spells.mjs && node scripts/content-import/md-procedures.mjs
scripts.content:verify: node scripts/content-import/md-inject.mjs --check && node scripts/content-import/md-rules.mjs --check && node scripts/content-import/md-spells.mjs --check && node scripts/content-import/md-procedures.mjs --check && node scripts/content-import/verify-pack-version.mjs
scripts.db:migrate:d1:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply guild-book-db --local
scripts.db:migrate:d1:remote: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply guild-book-db --remote
scripts.content:verify:ci: node scripts/content-import/md-procedures.mjs --check-generated && node scripts/content-import/verify-pack-version.mjs && npm test -- tests/unit/content-pack.test.ts tests/unit/tarot-procedure-audit.test.ts tests/unit/tarot-procedures.test.ts tests/unit/content-build.test.ts tests/unit/rules-coverage.test.ts
